last_excerpt: Coaxial cable. The word coax meaning to persuade and the word coax meaning a type of cable share a spelling and nothing else, probably. Braid. Braided river, braided hair, braided cable. The river one is strange — the river loses confidence and spreads across several channels, can't decide, deposits sediment in the middle of itself. Deposits. A bank is where a river keeps its edges. Also where money is kept. The metaphor ran so far it forgot it was a metaphor. A check that takes four business days to clear. What it's doing during those four days. Sitting in a room with water slowly rising. The word "float" in accounting means money that exists in two places at once, briefly, because the system hasn't caught up. A check that's been written but not cashed. The same twenty dollars in two wallets. Schrödinger didn't mean to become a shorthand for everything.
last_concepts: a definition that uses the word it's defining
the way a cold window fogs from your breath
a song that's always playing in a particular store
the feeling of recognizing someone's walk before their face
the shape of your own signature — how much of it is writing and how much is drawing
a window that won't stay open
the inside of a post office at 4:55 PM
